title: Amtech S3330 150cm (60") Chain
features: NON-SCRATCH: This 150cm (60") chain has rounded links and a protective sheath to prevent scratching
MULTIPLE USES: The padlock chain is ideal for securing motorbikes, bicycles and other security applications
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Chain See more
